abilities.name: Tactical Strike
abilities.rawDescription: After each Basic Attack: deal Tactical Damage to the original Basic Attack target. Attempt Bleed on the original Basic Attack target and one other enemy within adjacency; checks are independent per target. Classified as Command while preserving Attack Modifier presentation.

references.description: Use the target of the Basic Attack that triggered Tactical Strike.

activationRoll.description: Bleed checks are separate for each target.

notes: Bleed is periodic Physical Damage, +20% each round.
effects.target: Original Basic Attack target and one other enemy within adjacency

references.description: First checked target is the original Basic Attack target.
Second checked target is another enemy within adjacency.

abilities.name: Champion's Brilliance
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Kalspire Strength, Intelligence, and Instinct +15; Right Flank ally Damage Received -8%.

abilities.name: Robust Insight
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Kalspire Strength and Instinct.

abilities.name: Battle Cunning
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: target three enemies in any lane. Reduce Strength and Intelligence, enhanced by Instinct. Prose rounds L1 to -6%; table shows -6.5%.

abilities.name: Tactical Assault
abilities.rawDescription: Augments Tactical Strike: after each Basic Attack, select one enemy within adjacency that was not the original Basic Attack target, deal Physical Damage, then attempt Panic on that target and one other distinct adjacent enemy. Panic checks are independent per target.

effects.target: One enemy within adjacency that was not the original Basic Attack target

references.description: Physical Damage target is distinct from the original Basic Attack target.

activationRoll.description: Panic checks are separate for each target.

notes: Panic is periodic Tactical Damage, +20% each round.
effects.target: Physical Damage target and one other distinct enemy within adjacency

references.description: First Panic check uses the Physical Damage target.
Second Panic check uses another distinct adjacent enemy.

abilities.name: Dragon's Insight
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: reduce Damage Received and increase Instinct.

abilities.name: Radiant Conqueror
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1 for one round: Kalspire Damage Received -50% and Kalspire is afflicted with Stun. Start of Round 2 for five rounds: reduce non-Basic Physical Damage Dealt of enemy with highest Strength and Fire Damage Dealt of enemy with highest Intelligence. The selected enemies may be same or different.
unresolvedQuestions: Whether a legal allied cleanse can remove Radiant Conqueror Stun before Kalspire acts.

notes: Kalspire command, trait, affinities, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from screenshot evidence.
Bleed and Panic use independent per-target checks where the screenshots explicitly say checks are separate.
Radiant Conqueror self-Stun is preserved as a real Control status with cleanse timing unresolved.
Observation values are account-preview values and are not canonical base stats.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription: After each Basic Attack: deal Tactical Damage to the original Basic Attack target. Attempt Bleed on the original Basic Attack target and one other enemy within adjacency; checks are independent per target. Classified as Command while preserving Attack Modifier presentation.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Kalspire Strength, Intelligence, and Instinct +15; Right Flank ally Damage Received -8%.
Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Kalspire Strength and Instinct.
Start of Combat until end of combat: target three enemies in any lane. Reduce Strength and Intelligence, enhanced by Instinct. Prose rounds L1 to -6%; table shows -6.5%.

Augments Tactical Strike: after each Basic Attack, select one enemy within adjacency that was not the original Basic Attack target, deal Physical Damage, then attempt Panic on that target and one other distinct adjacent enemy. Panic checks are independent per target.
Start of Combat until end of combat: reduce Damage Received and increase Instinct.

Start of Round 1 for one round: Kalspire Damage Received -50% and Kalspire is afflicted with Stun. Start of Round 2 for five rounds: reduce non-Basic Physical Damage Dealt of enemy with highest Strength and Fire Damage Dealt of enemy with highest Intelligence. The selected enemies may be same or different.
